case_title: R PARMAR VS. RICHARD TOYOMA et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON MAR-26-2003 IN DEPT. 218 -STIPULATED JUDGMENT SIGNED BY DEFENDANTS FOR POSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 725 GEARY ST. #11, EXECUTION STAYED TO 5PM APRIL 8, 2003, IF DEFENDANTS DO NOT VACATE BY THE ABOVE DATE PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR BACK RENT OF $1700 AND DAMAGES OF $42.85 PER DAY FROM 3-3-03 THROUGH APRIL 8, 2003 FOR AN AMENDED JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $3492.75. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. TRIAL DATE VACATED. JPT GILBERT JAY, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (501A)
